title: After the Tenno Sho (Autumn): The Queens of Mud! ★

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Waheeey! ☆ Gotcha! ★ You're it, Palmster!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Over here! ♪ Follow the sound of my clapping!
Wahey!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Wait uuup! Oh, great! Mud's flying
everywhere! But I'm not gonna lose because of
that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer chases after Daitaku Helios, who
has been playfully leading her friend down the
track the entire time. And then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not only does Mejiro Palmer give the crowd a
thrill, her results are nothing to scoff at.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Bwahahaha! You look like you fell in a mud
puddle, Palmster! ★ You're totally covered!
Ahaha, I'm dying!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! Look who's talking! I can't tell where the mud ends and you begin! Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what is it with those two? They're behaving
even worse than at the Takarazuka Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
We were totally overshadowed by their
performance... Who knew there was a pair that
could run like that...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Uh... I ran today too, by the way. I feel kinda like
a third wheel, though...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Their friendship is ironclad. It's incredible they
have come so far.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Bestie, you're the bestest! Who knew running
could be so fun?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It felt like all my worries had disappeared while I
was running out there, and it's all thanks to you,
Helios!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Samesies! As long as I'm running with you, there's
no such thing as cramps or fatigue! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Guess this means 2,000 meters has got nothing
on me! ★

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: C'mon, let's go thank everyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Palmer heads to the outer fence.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Aw yeah, autumn Tenno Sho, you're the best! I
mean, sure, I was a little shook before...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But now, I've got nothin' but love for ya! Tokyo's
where it's at! Woooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer is showered with cheers while she
stands there, completely covered in mud... and
she looks happier than ever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later that evening...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two besties decide to talk over their final
race of the year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: We've got an idea for our last race, Trainer!
choice_data_list: Let me guess. The Arima Kinen.
Let me guess. The Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Bingo. It's the very last festival race, and we're
gonna tear it up!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Okaaay, but like! I'm a bit worried 2,500 meters might tear me up, not gonna lie!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
But I'm sure we'll figure something out. We've got
vibes for days, after all! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Are you sure about this, Helios?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You bet! ♪ We're all about the feels, so I'm sure
we'll be all G! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Depending on how she paces herself, she may just
be able to do it. I bet milers have won it before.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen... I wanna show our friendship
off to everyone there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: And maybe not just that.
choice_data_list: What else is on your list, then?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I want to show everyone something that
McQueen and Ryan have always made clear, but
that people have never seen from me before.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: My way of facing... my beloved Mejiro family.
choice_data_list: You're planning to face your family?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! All I've ever done is run and run and run
away from them, but what do I have to show for
it? What kind of racer have I become?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna show all that to everyone at the Arima Kinen! And I'll show them what a real party looks like!
